problem id: 63d4557e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01110110 -> 11100111
  01010001 -> 10011111
  00001001 -> 11111011
  00001011 -> 10110011
  01011001 -> 10111111
  10011111 -> 01101001
  11000101 -> 01001100
  11000011 -> 10011100

query: 11001011
predicted answer: 10111100
